payload.answer: Brain DB is the source of truth; Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack is a strict memory intake agent. Telegram addition and cheapest high-performing model are still open questions.
payload.decision: Brain DB is the source of truth; Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack should act as a strict memory intake agent. Telegram addition and cheapest high-performing model remain open questions.

entity_resolution.reason: No entity disambiguation or merge is required from the provided summary.

payload.intent: Capture architecture preferences and open questions from the chat summary.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection.
Slack should function as a strict memory intake agent.
It is undecided whether Telegram should be added later.
It is undecided which model is cheapest while saturating performance.

details: No superseded or deleted facts were present.

repair_options: Add a durable architecture preference card for Brain DB as source of truth.
Add a durable architecture preference card for Cognee as rebuildable semantic projection.
Add a durable architecture preference card for Slack as strict memory intake agent.
Track Telegram integration as an open question rather than a decision.
Track model selection as an open question rather than a decision.
